decisions.citation_anchor: Hybrid — short inline quote (first ~10 words) + expand-to-context link that jumps to the full transcript segment
decisions.citation_default_visibility: Hidden behind a 'Verify' / expand toggle (default off) — clean artifact by default, trust signal available on demand
decisions.low_confidence_handling: Flag with low-confidence marker ('Inferred — no direct quote') with lower visual weight; surface the item but make the uncertainty explicit

questions.q: What should the citation anchor look like?
Should citations be shown by default?
